step.title: Scan all artifacts
step.action: Scan docs/planning-artifacts/ and docs/implementation-artifacts/ for all existing documents.
Scan the codebase for README files, inline documentation, and code comments.

step.title: Generate project overview
step.action: Write a high-level overview of the project: purpose, target users, key features.

step.title: Document architecture
step.action: Describe the system architecture: components, data flow, technology stack, and design decisions.

step.title: Document APIs
step.action: Document all public APIs, endpoints, or interfaces with parameters, return types, and examples.

step.title: Document deployment
step.action: Write deployment instructions: prerequisites, environment setup, build steps, and deployment targets.

step.title: Produce documentation
step.template-output: Apply the template from template.md. Fill all sections from gathered information.
